measurement_note: Size is S=2^n, the bitmask state-space cardinality; the 16/64/256 tiers correspond to n=4/6/8 distinct values split into pairs. The Accepted anchored submask DP and an independent anchored valid-group DP take O(3^n)=O(S^(log_2 3)) time. A correct memoized implementation that scans every possible group mask at every reachable state takes O(4^n)=O(S^2), completes all tiers, and is rejected only by scaling.

cases.name: benchmark: 4 distinct values split into pairs
benchmark: 6 distinct values split into pairs
